settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this row? This action will only be permanent after clicking 'Save Changes'.

settings.importErrorColumnNames: Column names must be exactly: {expected}. Found: {received}.
settings.importErrorCsvFormat: The CSV format is invalid. Make sure every row has exactly 4 columns and there are no commas or line breaks inside values.
settings.importErrorUnsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Use a .csv, .xlsx or .xls file.
